basic_details.job_title: NIT Uttarakhand Junior Research Fellow, Research Associate and More Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate-I/ Junior Research Fellow/ Rearch Associate-I/ Research Associate-II/ Research Associate-III
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand (NIT Uttarakhand) Project Associate-I/Junior Research Fellow/Research Associate-I/Research Associate-II/Research Associate-III Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Uttarakhand. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Uttarakhand Project Associate-I/Junior Research Fellow/Research Associate-I/Research Associate-II/Research Associate-III Recruitment 2026. Candidates preferably below 35 years who have B.E/B.Tech in ECE/CSE/EEE/Biomedical Engineering or allied areas, M.E/M.Tech/M.S in ECE/Biom

qualification.details: B.E/B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Computer Science & Engineering/Electrical and Electronics Engineering/Biomedical Engineering or allied areas OR M.E/M.Tech./M.S in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Biomedical Engineering/Digital Signal Processing/Signal Processing or allied areas with minimum 1st class and GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (Age: Preferably below 35 Years) OR Ph.D in Microelectronics & VLSI Design or Signal Processing or M.E/M.Tech having 3 years research experience with at least one research paper in SCI/SCIE Journal (Specialized in Design and Development of Instrumentation Amplifier for EEG Signal Acquisition or FPGA implementation of EEG Signal Processing, Machine Learning and Deep Learning Algorithms).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Associate-I/ Junior Research Fellow/ Research Associate-I/ Research Associate-II/ Research Associate-III

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the NIT Uttarakhand Project Associate-I/Junior Research Fellow/Research Associate-I/Research Associate-II/Research Associate-III posts is scheduled for 20th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report as per the timings mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by NIT Uttarakhand?
faq.answer: NIT Uttarakhand has released a total of 1 vacancy for the position of Project Associate-I/Junior Research Fellow/Research Associate-I/Research Associate-II/Research Associate-III in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification includes B.E/B.Tech in relevant engineering fields, M.E/M.Tech/M.S with GATE/CSIR-UGC NET, or Ph.D. in specialized areas. Please refer to the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I/Junior Research Fellow/Research Associate-I/Research Associate-II/Research Associate-III posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these positions ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 67,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for these positions is preferably below 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview, which may be conducted in a hybrid mode. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand, Srinagar Garhwal, Uttarakhand - 246174. Candidates must report at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Associate-I/Junior Research Fellow/Research Associate-I/Research Associate-II/Research Associate-III posts at NIT Uttarakhand is Contractual.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the NIT Uttarakhand Project Associate-I/Junior Research Fellow/Research Associate-I/Research Associate-II/Research Associate-III posts is scheduled for 20th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report as per the timings mentioned in the notification.
